sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: Form 424B2 JPMORGAN CHASE & CO
feed.summary: JPMorgan Chase Financial Company LLC has filed a Form 424B2 with the SEC for Callable Contingent Interest Notes due February 22, 2030. These notes are linked to the performance of the Nasdaq-100 Index, Russell 2000 Index, and State Street Utilities Select Sector SPDR ETF, offering contingent interest payments if each underlying is above its interest barrier. The notes are unsecured obligations of JPMorgan Financial, guaranteed by JPMorgan Chase & Co., and involve risks including potential loss of principal and credit risk.

feed.title: BrightSpring Health Services, Inc. to Host Investor Day on March 17, 2026
feed.summary: BrightSpring Health Services, Inc. (NASDAQ: BTSG) announced it will host an Investor Day on Tuesday, March 17, 2026, starting at 8:30 a.m. ET. The event will include presentations by the leadership team and Q&A sessions. A webcast will be available on the company's investor relations website, and in-person attendance is by invitation only for institutional investors and analysts.

feed.title: ARMOUR Residential will pay 24-cent March dividend on Mar. 30
feed.summary: ARMOUR Residential REIT (NYSE: ARR) has announced a cash dividend of $0.24 per common share for March 2026. The dividend will be paid on March 30, 2026, to shareholders of record as of March 16, 2026. As a REIT, ARMOUR is required to distribute most of its taxable income, but actual dividends remain at the board's discretion.

feed.title: FirstEnergy pours $36B into grid to cut outages and meet demand
feed.summary: FirstEnergy (NYSE: FE) has announced its 2025 financial results, reporting GAAP EPS of $1.77 and Core EPS of $2.55, alongside affirming its 2026 Core EPS guidance of $2.62-$2.82. The company unveiled a substantial $36 billion Energize365 capital investment plan for 2026-2030, aimed at enhancing grid reliability, reducing outages, and preparing for future demand, projecting a 10% compounded annual rate base growth. This strategic investment is expected to drive Core EPS compounded annual growth near the top end of the 6-8% range.

feed.title: Equifax Delivers Optimal Path™ Directly to U.S. Consumers via the myEquifax Mobile App
feed.summary: Equifax is introducing Optimal Path, an interactive credit score planner, directly to U.S. consumers via the myEquifax mobile app for free. Leveraging advanced cloud-native and EFX.AI capabilities, Optimal Path creates personalized 30-day action plans to help users reach their target VantageScore 3.0 credit score goals. This tool aims to empower consumers by providing actionable steps and tracking their progress towards financial objectives.

feed.title: 5 things top news: Target’s turnaround begins at the store
feed.summary: Target's new CEO plans to initiate the company's turnaround by focusing on enhancing the customer experience within its stores. This announcement is highlighted in a "5 things top news" summary from Supermarket News. The article also mentions other retail news, including Dollar General's new private-label air freshener line.

feed.title: Nvidia to sell Meta millions of chips in multiyear deal
feed.summary: Nvidia has announced a multiyear deal to supply Meta Platforms with millions of its current and future AI chips, including central processing units designed to compete with Intel and AMD. The agreement encompasses Nvidia's Blackwell and forthcoming Rubin AI chips, as well as its Grace and Vera central processors. This move highlights Nvidia's strategy to expand its chip offerings beyond AI into areas like database management and to solidify its business relationship with Meta, despite Meta's own AI chip development efforts.

feed.title: Lam Research Corporation Announces Participation at Upcoming Conferences
feed.summary: Lam Research Corporation announced that its Executive Vice President and CFO, Doug Bettinger, will participate in two upcoming investor conferences: the Morgan Stanley TMT Conference on March 3, 2026, and the Cantor Global Technology & Industrial Growth Conference on March 11, 2026. Live audio webcasts of these presentations will be available for public access via the investors' section of Lam Research's website. Lam Research is a global supplier of innovative wafer fabrication equipment and services for the semiconductor industry.

feed.title: Cadence Design (CDNS) Sees Surge in Pre-Earnings Options Activit
feed.summary: Cadence Design Systems (CDNS) is experiencing a notable surge in pre-earnings options trading, with a significant skew towards put options. Despite strong financial health, including impressive revenue growth and profitability, the company's valuation metrics show premium pricing beyond historical medians. There's insider selling activity to consider, but analyst sentiment remains positive with high institutional ownership.

feed.title: ACGL's Price Target Raised by UBS Following Continued 'Buy' Rating | ACGL Stock News
feed.summary: UBS has increased its price target for Arch Capital Group (ACGL) from $113.00 to $114.00, while maintaining a 'Buy' rating. This uplift follows similar actions from other major analysts, reflecting a generally optimistic outlook on ACGL's growth potential. The company, a Bermuda-based insurer and reinsurer, operates across insurance, reinsurance, and mortgage segments, with an average analyst target price of $109.00 suggesting a 10.01% upside.

feed.title: Devon Energy tops fourth-quarter profit estimates on production boost
feed.summary: Devon Energy (DVN.N) exceeded Wall Street's fourth-quarter profit forecasts, driven by increased oil and gas production. This performance comes weeks after the company announced a $58 billion merger with Coterra Energy (CTRA.N) aimed at controlling costs, strengthening its balance sheet, and expanding its presence in the Permian Basin, despite a challenging crude oil price environment. The company reported an adjusted profit of 82 cents per share, slightly above analysts' estimates of 81 cents.

feed.title: Cadence Design Systems pops as Q4 results, full-year guidance tops estimates (CDNS:NASDAQ)
feed.summary: Cadence Design Systems (CDNS) shares rose approximately 2.5% in extended trading following its Q4 results and full-year guidance surpassing Wall Street expectations. The electronic design automation firm reported strong performance for the period ending December 31. This positive financial update led to an immediate increase in investor confidence.

feed.title: USANA Health Sciences Reports Fourth Quarter and Full Year 2025 Results and Provides Fiscal Year 2026 Outlook
feed.summary: USANA Health Sciences announced its financial results for the fourth quarter and full fiscal year 2025, along with its outlook for fiscal year 2026. The company reported a net loss in Q4 2025 but saw an 8% increase in fiscal year 2025 net sales, primarily driven by its Hiya brand, and provided guidance for continued growth in 2026 with an emphasis on its omnichannel strategy and new product lines like Rise Wellness. The company also detailed non-GAAP financial measures and reconciliations, emphasizing its strong balance sheet and strategic investments for future growth.

feed.title: ARMOUR Residential REIT, Inc. Fourth Quarter 2025 Webcast Scheduled for February 19, 2026
feed.summary: ARMOUR Residential REIT, Inc. announced that it will host an online webcast for its fourth quarter 2025 operating results on Thursday, February 19, 2026, at 9:00 a.m. Eastern Time. The company will release its earnings after the market closes on Wednesday, February 18, 2026. The webcast will be available live at a specified link and an archived replay will be available on the company's website for one year.

feed.title: Applied Optoelectronics to Present at the Raymond James & Associates’ 47th Annual Institutional Investors Conference
feed.summary: Applied Optoelectronics, Inc. (AOI) announced it will present at the Raymond James & Associates’ 47th Annual Institutional Investors Conference. Stefan Murry, CFO and CSO, will participate in a fireside chat on March 3rd, 2026, at 9:15 a.m. Eastern time. A recording of the presentation will be available on the company's investor relations website.

feed.title: MetLife Announces First Quarter 2026 Preferred Stock Dividend Actions
feed.summary: MetLife, Inc. (NYSE: MET) has declared preferred stock dividends for the first quarter of 2026, including semi-annual and quarterly dividends for its Series D, E, and F preferred stocks. A quarterly dividend for Series A preferred stock was also declared, subject to final confirmation of financial tests around March 5, 2026. The dividends are payable on March 16, 2026, to shareholders of record as of February 27, 2026.

feed.title: BrightSpring plans March 17 Investor Day, most access via webcast
feed.summary: BrightSpring Health Services (NASDAQ: BTSG) announced it will host an Investor Day on March 17, 2026, featuring presentations from leadership and Q&A sessions. While in-person attendance is limited and by invitation, a live webcast and archived replay will be available on the company's investor relations website for broader access. Interested institutional investors and analysts can contact the company for invitation details.

feed.title: Vulcan Materials slides after Q4 earnings miss and softer-than-expected 2026 outlook
feed.summary: Vulcan Materials (VMC) shares dropped 7.8% following a fourth-quarter 2025 earnings miss and a 2026 profitability outlook that suggested slower growth than anticipated. The company reported adjusted EPS of $1.70 on revenue of $1.91 billion for Q4 2025 and guided to adjusted EBITDA of $2.4 billion to $2.6 billion for 2026, which disappointed investors. This comes amidst significant insider selling and mixed institutional investor activity in recent months.

feed.title: Devon Energy Q4 Earnings Summary & Key Takeaways
feed.summary: Devon Energy (NYSE: DVN) reported its Q4 earnings on February 17, 2026, missing estimated earnings per share (EPS) by 0.0% with an EPS of $0.82 against an estimate of $0.82. The company's revenue was down $282.00 million compared to the same period last year. In the previous quarter, Devon Energy beat EPS estimates, leading to a 0.28% increase in share price the next day.

feed.title: Stanley Druckenmiller's Duquesne initiates position in Goldman Sachs, exits Meta in Q4 (AA:NYSE)
feed.summary: Stanley Druckenmiller's Duquesne Family Office initiated a position in Goldman Sachs (GS) and exited Meta Platforms (META) in Q4. The family office bought approximately 28,000 shares of Goldman Sachs common stock and sold about 76,000 Class A shares of Meta. Duquesne also made other significant changes, including initiating positions in airlines and increasing stakes in technology and life sciences companies.

feed.title: How United Rentals ranked #3 for customer satisfaction in WSJ study
feed.summary: United Rentals (NYSE: URI) has once again been recognized on The Wall Street Journal’s Management Top 250 list, developed by the Drucker Institute, for its effective management practices. The company achieved a notable #3 ranking in customer satisfaction among 668 assessed companies, alongside strong placements in employee engagement and financial strength. This recognition highlights United Rentals' commitment to its customers, employees, and stakeholders, driven by the efforts of its over 28,000 team members.

feed.title: 8x8, Strategy, MongoDB, Fastly, and Intuit Shares Are Falling, What You Need To Know
feed.summary: Shares of 8x8, Strategy, MongoDB, Fastly, and Intuit fell in an afternoon session due to investor fears regarding artificial intelligence disrupting traditional Software-as-a-Service (SaaS) business models, sparking a broad sell-off. This "AI Panic" led to indiscriminate selling across the software sector. Additionally, a stronger-than-expected U.S. jobs report pushed back expectations for Federal Reserve interest rate cuts, creating headwinds for growth-oriented technology stocks.

feed.title: Caesars (NASDAQ: CZR) 2025 loss widens while digital EBITDA more than doubles
feed.summary: Caesars Entertainment reported a wider GAAP net loss of $502 million for the full year 2025, primarily due to large asset sale gains in the previous year, despite a modest increase in GAAP net revenues to $11.5 billion. While overall same-store Adjusted EBITDA saw a slight decline, the Caesars Digital segment showed strong growth, more than doubling its Adjusted EBITDA to $236 million. The company aims to use future free cash flow for debt reduction and opportunistic share repurchases, with expectations of a stable brick-and-mortar operating environment and continued digital growth in 2026.

feed.title: UBS Lowers S&P Global (SPGI) Price Target While Maintaining Buy Rating | SPGI Stock News
feed.summary: UBS has reconfirmed its Buy rating for S&P Global (SPGI) but adjusted its price target down to $550 from $620, reflecting an 11.29% decrease. This move by UBS analyst Alex Kramm suggests a more cautious outlook on the company's future performance despite continued confidence in its long-term prospects. Other analysts have also recently lowered their price targets for SPGI, indicating a broader cautious trend in the market.

feed.title: UBS Maintains Buy Rating on AIG, Lowers Price Target | AIG Stock News
feed.summary: UBS analysts have reaffirmed their 'Buy' rating for American International Group (AIG), though they have slightly reduced the price target from $94.00 to $92.00. This adjustment reflects a cautious sentiment but continued confidence in AIG's market performance. The article also provides a summary of recent analyst ratings and Wall Street forecasts for AIG, indicating an "Outperform" status based on overall brokerage recommendations.

feed.title: Public Storage will pay $3.00 a share in March dividend
feed.summary: Public Storage (NYSE: PSA) announced a regular quarterly common dividend of $3.00 per common share, payable on March 31, 2026, to shareholders of record as of March 16, 2026. The company also declared dividends for its preferred shares. Public Storage is a REIT that acquires, develops, owns, and operates self-storage facilities across 40 U.S. states and holds a significant interest in Shurgard Self Storage Limited in Europe.

feed.title: 12 Health Care Stocks Moving In Tuesday's After-Market Session
feed.summary: This article lists 12 healthcare stocks that experienced significant movement during Tuesday's after-market session. Six companies were gainers, led by Mobile-health Network, Bio Green Med Solution, and NovaBridge Biosciences, while six were losers, including Halozyme Therapeutics, Xencor, and Quince Therapeutics. The movements include percentage changes and market capitalization data for each listed stock.

feed.title: Chevron’s Greece Deal Aligns with EU’s Phase-Out of Russian Gas
feed.summary: Chevron has entered into a deal with Greece to explore four Mediterranean blocks offshore, holding a 70% operating interest in a lease agreement, with Helleniq Energy holding the remaining 30%. This agreement aligns with the European Union's ongoing efforts to phase out Russian gas. The initiative highlights a strategic shift in energy sources for the EU and its partners.

feed.title: Clearwater Paper Announces Participation in Bank of America Global Agricultural and Materials Conference
feed.summary: Clearwater Paper Corporation (NYSE: CLW) announced its upcoming participation in the Bank of America 2026 Global Agricultural and Materials Conference on February 25, 2026. President and CEO Arsen Kitch will participate in a panel discussion and a fireside chat, and will be available for investor meetings alongside CFO Sherri Baker. The company specializes in paperboard packaging products for North American converters.

feed.title: West Pharmaceutical Declares Quarterly Dividend and Share Repurchase Program
feed.summary: West Pharmaceutical has declared a quarterly dividend of $0.22 per share, payable on May 6, 2026, and initiated a new share repurchase program of up to $1 billion in common stock. These actions reflect the company's commitment to shareholder returns and its flexible approach to capital management. Analysts have mixed views on the stock, with Deutsche Bank raising its price target while UBS lowered it, both maintaining a 'Buy' rating.

feed.title: Archer-Daniels-Midland Co SEC 10-K Report
feed.summary: Archer-Daniels-Midland Company (ADM) has released its 2025 Form 10-K report, detailing a decrease in revenues, gross profit, and net earnings compared to the previous year, with diluted EPS falling to $2.23. The report highlights ADM's global leadership in agricultural supply chain management across its Ag Services and Oilseeds, Carbohydrate Solutions, and Nutrition segments, alongside strategic initiatives focused on operational excellence and targeted growth. Despite financial declines, ADM is pursuing future growth through investments in nutrition, biosolutions, and decarbonization, while acknowledging various operational, geopolitical, and market-related risks.

feed.title: Realty Income Announces 668th Consecutive Common Stock Monthly Dividend
feed.summary: Realty Income (NYSE: O) has declared its 668th consecutive common stock monthly dividend of $0.2700 per share, which annualizes to $3.240 per share. This dividend is payable on March 13, 2026, to shareholders of record as of February 27, 2026. The company, known as "The Monthly Dividend Company," is a member of the S&P 500 Dividend Aristocrats index, having increased its dividend for over 31 consecutive years.

feed.title: Devon Energy Reports Fourth-Quarter and Full-Year 2025 Results and Declares Quarterly Fixed Dividend
feed.summary: Devon Energy Corp. announced its financial and operational results for the fourth quarter and full fiscal year 2025. The company also declared its quarterly dividend and provided a 2026 outlook. Further details, including supplemental financial tables and guidance, are available on Devon's investor relations website, and a conference call for analysts and investors is scheduled for February 18, 2026.

feed.title: Lam Research Opens New Office in Boise, Idaho
feed.summary: Lam Research has opened a new 9,200 sq. ft. office in Boise, Idaho, to support 150 employees working on collaborative R&D and high-volume manufacturing with Micron. This expansion strengthens its partnership with Micron and aims to boost U.S. semiconductor manufacturing, job creation, and economic security. The move aligns with Lam Research's strategy to enhance innovation and operational velocity for chipmakers in the AI era.

feed.title: Vertex Pharmaceuticals Stock Jumps 7% Following Oppenheimer Upgrade: Here’s Where the Stock Could Go in 2026
feed.summary: Vertex Pharmaceuticals (VRTX) shares climbed 7% after Oppenheimer upgraded the stock to "Outperform" with a $540 price target, driven by excitement for its emerging renal pipeline, particularly the drug povetacicept. Analysts believe the market is undervaluing Vertex's diversification beyond Cystic Fibrosis into kidney disease, pain management, and gene editing. The TIKR Model suggests the stock is significantly undervalued, projecting a target price of $849 by 2030, with an annualized return of 11.9% due to the pipeline's growth potential and diversification de-risking the stock.

feed.title: Ross Stores to detail $21.1B business in March 3 earnings call
feed.summary: Ross Stores (Nasdaq: ROST) will release its fourth quarter and fiscal 2025 earnings on March 3, 2026, at approximately 4:00 p.m. Eastern time. A live audio webcast will follow at 4:15 p.m. Eastern on the company's investor website, with replays available through March 10, 2026. The company reported fiscal 2024 revenue of $21.1 billion and operates 1,904 Ross stores and 363 dd's DISCOUNTS locations.

feed.title: Samsara, Cadence Design Systems, BILL, Workiva, and Okta Stocks Trade Down, What You Need To Know
feed.summary: Several software stocks, including Samsara, Cadence Design Systems, BILL, Workiva, and Okta, experienced a decline in trading due to investor fears that artificial intelligence advancements could disrupt traditional Software-as-a-Service (SaaS) business models. This "AI Panic" led to a broad market sell-off across the sector. Workiva, specifically, saw a 6.8% drop, with its shares trading significantly below its 52-week high, reflecting widespread negative sentiment in the market.

feed.title: West Pharmaceutical clears $1B for stock buybacks and a May dividend
feed.summary: West Pharmaceutical Services (NYSE: WST) has declared a regular quarterly dividend of $0.22 per share, payable on May 6, 2026. Additionally, the company's board has authorized a new $1.0 billion share repurchase program with no expiration date, following the full utilization of its previous program. These actions highlight West's ongoing commitment to returning capital to shareholders through both dividends and buybacks.

feed.title: West Announces Quarterly Dividend and Share Repurchase Program
feed.summary: West Pharmaceutical Services, Inc. (NYSE: WST) has announced a regular quarterly dividend of $0.22 per share, payable on May 6, 2026, to shareholders of record on April 29, 2026. Additionally, the Board of Directors authorized a new share repurchase program of up to $1 billion of the Company's common stock, following the full utilization of its previous program. West, a global leader in injectable drug administration solutions, generated $3.07 billion in net sales in fiscal year 2025.

feed.title: Vertex to Participate in TD Cowen 46th Annual Health Care Conference on March 3
feed.summary: Vertex Pharmaceuticals will participate in TD Cowen's 46th Annual Health Care Conference on March 3, 2026. Reshma Kewalramani, President and CEO, will conduct a fireside chat at 9:10 a.m. ET, which will be webcast live on the company's investor relations website. Vertex is a biotechnology company focused on developing transformative medicines for serious diseases.

feed.title: Mixed-use project in Passaic County gets major financing for 90 luxury apartments, self-storage facility
feed.summary: JLL Capital Markets has secured a construction loan for the High Mountain Promenade, a mixed-use development in North Haledon, Passaic County. The project will include a large self-storage facility, 90 luxury apartments, and 4,400 square feet of retail space. First Bank is providing the financing, primarily for the self-storage phase, which will be managed by Public Storage.

feed.title: Phase III of Willow Grove Shopping Center construction to begin in summer 2026
feed.summary: Federal Realty Investment Trust announced that Phase III construction at the Willow Grove Shopping Center will start in summer 2026. This $105 million project will transform 130,000 square feet of retail into a mixed-use development with 261 residential units, 35,000 square feet of new retail space, and a 438-stall parking garage. The project aims to create a vibrant, pedestrian-friendly environment with new shopping, dining, and residential amenities.

feed.title: HII Teams with Path Robotics to Integrate Physical AI into Manned and Unmanned Shipbuilding
feed.summary: HII and Path Robotics have signed a memorandum of understanding to integrate Path's physical AI for welding into shipbuilding operations, aiming to accelerate throughput and strengthen the maritime industrial base. This partnership seeks to augment the shipbuilding workforce and increase production, with a goal to improve HII's throughput by an additional 15% in 2026. The collaboration will focus on autonomous shipbuilding capability development, workforce training for automation, and establishing an intellectual property framework for AI-based autonomous welding systems.

feed.title: How Virco Manufacturing Corporation (VIRC) Affects Rotational Strategy Timing
feed.summary: This article analyzes Virco Manufacturing Corporation (VIRC) using AI models, indicating weak sentiment across all time horizons and supporting a short bias. It outlines detailed institutional trading strategies including position, momentum breakout, and risk hedging, complete with entry zones, target prices, and stop losses. The analysis also highlights a significant risk-reward setup for potential gains.

feed.title: Tesla says the first Cybercab has been built in Austin
feed.summary: Tesla announced the production of its first Cybercab at Gigafactory Texas, a purpose-built robotaxi. CEO Elon Musk congratulated the team, with future production slated for April. The vehicle's final design elements, like the absence of a steering wheel, are expected to be confirmed during the official production ramp-up.

feed.title: KLA stock steadies on ex-dividend day as chip-tool names track Fed-rate bets
feed.summary: KLA stock saw a slight increase of 0.7% to $1,473.71 on its ex-dividend day, mirroring gains in other chip equipment stocks like Lam Research and Applied Materials, as investors tracked Federal Reserve interest rate expectations. The stability in chip-tool names is seen as a key indicator for the AI expansion and the impact of financial conditions. Despite the ex-dividend trading and recent Fed signals suggesting sustained tight policy, KLA's previous strong earnings and outlook continue to support its position in the market.

feed.title: Why LKQ (LKQ) Shares Are Falling Today
feed.summary: Shares of LKQ (NASDAQ:LKQ) fell 4.5% after its competitor, Genuine Parts Company (GPC), reported disappointing fourth-quarter financial results, raising concerns across the auto parts sector. GPC's weak performance, including a GAAP net loss and missed earnings estimates, negatively impacted peers like LKQ. This market reaction, while significant, is noted as not highly volatile for LKQ, which had previously experienced a more substantial 21% drop seven months ago due to its own disappointing Q2 2025 results and lowered full-year guidance.

feed.title: Energy Transfer Launches Natural Gas Deliveries to Oracle Data Center
feed.summary: Energy Transfer LP has commenced natural gas deliveries to Oracle Corp.’s data center in Texas. This move signals a significant increase in demand for natural gas from the Permian Basin and Haynesville Shale, driven by the energy-intensive operations of data centers. Energy Transfer anticipates further expansion, with two additional lateral pipelines expected by mid-2026.

feed.title: ACV Auctions, eBay, Chewy, Expedia, and Chegg Shares Are Falling, What You Need To Know
feed.summary: A number of stocks including ACV Auctions, eBay, Chewy, Expedia, and Chegg experienced a notable decline in share value. This sell-off was attributed to investor concerns that artificial intelligence, particularly "agentic AI" tools, could disrupt traditional Software-as-a-Service (SaaS) business models, leading to widespread selling across the sector. Despite the downturn, the article suggests that significant price drops could present buying opportunities for high-quality stocks.

feed.title: Ibotta, Cognex, Insperity, Viasat, and EPAM Shares Are Falling, What You Need To Know
feed.summary: Shares of Ibotta, Cognex, Insperity, Viasat, and EPAM fell due to investor fears that artificial intelligence could disrupt traditional Software-as-a-Service (SaaS) business models, sparking a broad sell-off in the sector. The market reaction indicates growing concerns about the negative impact of the AI boom on established software companies. Despite the recent dip, investors are encouraged to see big price drops as potential buying opportunities for high-quality stocks.
